content:
Phase 2: State UCC Scrapers (Weeks 3-4)


// Files to create:
scripts/scrapers/
├── base-scraper.ts
├── states/
│ ├── california.ts
│ ├── texas.ts
│ ├── florida.ts
│ └── ... (50 states)
└── scraper-manager.ts // Orchestrate all scrapers

// Example California scraper:
export class CaliforniaUCCScraper extends BaseUCCScraper {
async search(companyName: string) {
await this.page.goto('https://bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov/search/business');
await this.page.fill('#EntityName', companyName);
await this.page.click('#SearchButton');
return this.extractResults();
}
}


Phase 3: Backend API (Weeks 5-6)
context: From document: data enrichment strategy for ucc-mca intelligence platform — chunk 12 (chunk 12/32)
